race.comment: JUST RESPONSE (6) talented gelding ready to go to the next level this campaign. Sat on the strong tempo with a fighting second to Three Arrows over 1300m at Hawkesbury last November. Has looked very good in both trial victories over the 1000m. Regular rider sticks and can get the job done. SILENCIO PORFAVOR (4) at his top for this fourth-up and looking for the 1200m now. Stuck on well with the 60kg when third over 1100m at this track. Claim helps and no excuses today. LONE ARTIST (5) has a host of gear changes for this from the low draw. Form has since been franked after he faded late when seventh over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Key jockey change and stays in the mix. OLUFSEN (7) improver on the firmer surface after he faded late when last to Cuban Cigar over 1300m at Kembla Grange. Holds a forward position and can take a hand in the finish.
